name: BARRETT BUSINESS SERVICES INC
summary: Barrett Business Services, Inc. (BBSI) is a leading provider of business management solutions for small and mid-sized companies. Through its Professional Employer Organization (PEO) platform, BBSI offers co-employment services including payroll processing, workers compensation coverage, employee benefits, HR outsourcing, risk mitigation, and workplace safety. It also provides staffing services including on-demand staffing, contract staffing, direct placement, and on-site management. BBSI served over 8,200 PEO clients with 138,218 average worksite employees during 2025.

products.name: Professional Employer Services (PEO)
products.description: Co-employment service covering payroll, payroll taxes, workers compensation, benefits, HR advisory, and compliance for small and mid-sized businesses.

products.name: Staffing Services
products.description: On-demand, contract, direct placement, and long-term on-site staffing and recruiting solutions for client companies.

products.name: myBBSI
products.description: Client-facing technology platform enabling payroll processing, time and attendance, HR information management, benefits, and payroll tax reporting.

products.name: Workers Compensation Coverage
products.description: Workers compensation insurance and claims management provided to PEO clients through third-party administrators.

products.name: Employee Benefit Programs
products.description: Fully insured medical, dental, vision, life insurance, FSA, HSA, and disability coverage offered through third-party carriers.
